name: Jb Hi-Fi Limited
analysis: JBH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$77.9600, stop A$66.7062, target A$87.8784 (0.88:1) — then trail it.
